Trigger: Staff enters original order number in cell B7 of Exchange Calculator sheet
Subject: N/A — auto-fills: customer name (B4), email (B5), phone (B6), order date (B8), SKU (B10), karat (B12), net wt (B15), dia cts (B16), gold rate at order time (B19), live gold rate (C19), live diamond value (B20/C20), formula-driven gold value (B27) and diamond value (B28)

Stage: Multi-SKU Selection (if order has multiple line items)
Trigger: Staff enters order number with multiple line items
Subject: N/A — staff enters item numbers (e.g. 1 or 1,2) to select one or more SKUs. Net wt and dia cts are summed across selections. Gold rates shown as X / Y per SKU.

Trigger: Staff clicks Create Credit Note & Tag Order from the Timanti CN Tools menu after reviewing calculated net credit (B36)
Subject: Your Timanti Credit Note — CNTM-YYYY-XXXX
Content Summary: CN number as discount code, credit value (₹), valid until date (90 days from issue), instructions to use online (enter code at checkout) or in-store (show email to consultant)

Subject: N/A — tags added to original order: cn-issued / cn-num:CNTM-... / cn-val:X.XX / cn-exp:dd-mm-yyyy / cn-iss:dd-mm-yyyy
N/A — appends row: issue date / CN number / order number / customer name / email / net wt / dia cts / gold value / dia value / net credit / expiry / status=Issued

Stage: Credit Note Email (alternative webhook path — flag-gated)
Trigger: When cn-issued tag is added to a Shopify order AND CN_EMAIL_ENABLED=true on middleware AND timanti.cn_number metafield exists on the order AND cn-email-sent tag is NOT already present
Subject: Your Timanti Credit Note — [cn_number from metafield]
Content Summary: Same content as above: CN number, credit value, valid until, usage instructions. After sending, adds cn-email-sent tag to the order to prevent re-send.
